resources.string: Shown while ChaosVoice is processing your voice
Microphone access is needed to use ChaosVoice. Tap to grant.
Notification permission is required for ChaosVoice to run in the background.
Battery optimization exemption helps keep your session stable in the background.
Couldn\'t access the microphone. Try restarting the app.
Couldn\'t start audio playback. Please try again.
Another app is using audio right now.
Couldn\'t load that preset — reverted to default.
Couldn\'t save preset. Please try again.
